message:
fix(robot): update TestCategoryIndex to include attention category

The categoryOrder slice includes "attention" at index 1 since the
attention feed commands were added. Update test expectations to match
the actual category order:
  0: state
  1: attention
  2: ensemble
  3: control
  4: spawn
  5: beads
  6: bv
  7: cass
  8: pipeline
  9: utility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,14 +18,15 @@ func TestCategoryIndex(t *testing.T) {
 		want int
 	}{
 		{"state", "state", 0},
-		{"ensemble", "ensemble", 1},
-		{"control", "control", 2},
-		{"spawn", "spawn", 3},
-		{"beads", "beads", 4},
-		{"bv", "bv", 5},
-		{"cass", "cass", 6},
-		{"pipeline", "pipeline", 7},
-		{"utility", "utility", 8},
+		{"attention", "attention", 1},
+		{"ensemble", "ensemble", 2},
+		{"control", "control", 3},
+		{"spawn", "spawn", 4},
+		{"beads", "beads", 5},
+		{"bv", "bv", 6},
+		{"cass", "cass", 7},
+		{"pipeline", "pipeline", 8},
+		{"utility", "utility", 9},
 		{"unknown category", "nonexistent", len(categoryOrder)},
 		{"empty string", "", len(categoryOrder)},
 	}
